zh.lifeSummary: 當William Constable於1150年出生在英國越可爾伯頓 康斯特勃時，他的父親Robert Constable40歲，母親Aubreye Lisours27歲。他於1177年之前與Julia Altoft在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年在英國英格蘭越可爾巴洛享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Constable was born in 1150, in Burton Constable, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Constable, was 40 and his mother, Aubreye Lisours, was 27. He married Julia Altoft before 1177, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1211, in Barlow, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Constable est né en 1150, à Burton Constable, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Constable, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Aubreye Lisours, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Julia Altoft avant 1177, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1211, à Barlow, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Constable(이)가 1150년 영국 요르크실르 버턴 콘스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Constable(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Aubreye Lisours(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1177년 이전 영국에서 Julia Altoft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 발로에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Constable родился в 1150 г. в местности буртон кунстабл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Constable было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Aubreye Lisours, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Julia Altoft перед 1177 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1211 г. в местности барлоу, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
